steps.title: Write the perimeter in terms of x
steps.content:
The perimeter of a rectangle is $P = 2L + 2W$. With length 50 and width $x$:

$$P = 2(50) + 2x = 100 + 2x$$

steps.title: Translate the constraint to an inequality
steps.content:
At most 210 means the perimeter cannot exceed 210, so we use the less-than-or-equal symbol:

$$2x + 100 \le 210$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
